reviews.review_msg: Sophia was an amazing professor! All around very genuine and caring about her students. No textbooks needed, and her exams were not too difficult. Be prepared for class discussions, but overall she is the best professor I have ever had and I would definitely take a class with her again! I highly recommend taking a class with Sophia.
cares for her students, cares for how everyone is doing. easy to talk to, always makes it clear and reminds everyone she is available on Slack if anyone needs help. Would definitely take her again
